/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -Wno-deprecated-builtins -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/SimpleWallet.dir/SimpleWallet/ClientHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWallet.dir/SimpleWallet/PasswordContainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWallet.dir/SimpleWallet/SimpleWallet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWallet.dir/SimpleWallet/TransferCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWallet.dir/SimpleWallet/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWallet.dir/SwapDaemon/AdaptorSwap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWallet.dir/SwapDaemon/SwapTypes.cpp.o -o fire_wallet   -L/home/ar/Downloads/fuego-suite-transferable-cd-fee-pool/build-check/src/src/FuegoTor  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ar/Downloads/fuego-suite-transferable-cd-fee-pool/build-check/src/src/FuegoTor libWallet.a libNodeRpcProxy.a libTransfers.a libRpc.a libHttp.a libCryptoNoteCore.a libSystem.a libLogging.a libCommon.a libCrypto.a -lrt libSerialization.a -ljsoncpp libSimpleWalletLib.a -lresolv libWallet.a libNodeRpcProxy.a libRpc.a libSwapDaemonLib.a libHttp.a libCryptoNoteCore.a libTransfers.a libP2P.a ../external/miniupnpc/libminiupnpc.a libBlockchainExplorer.a libSystem.a libLogging.a libCrypto.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_regex.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_serialization.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_coroutine.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_context.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.74.0 -lrt libSerialization.a libCommon.a -ljsoncpp
